prose:
Method–provenance summary (frontier orbitals)
Property: HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans orbital gap), HOMO and LUMO one-electron energies; units eV.
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS, exact four-center integrals ‑- no density fitting).
Geometry provenance: fixed Cartesian coordinates from user-supplied file /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz (no further optimization; single-point calculation = DFT//given-xyz).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
Charge & multiplicity: charge 0, multiplicity 2 (doublet, unrestricted Kohn–Sham).
Software: PySCF backend via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill (engine_subcommand `frontier`).
Convergence & caveats: SCF converged in 12 cycles; integrity.status = ok, trustworthy = true; no warnings reported by the engine.
Live log / reproducibility: run invoked as
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 2 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz
with full JSON result at /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpt82xk4lf/live.json. The engine streamed its live output to the associated .out log in the same scratch directory during execution.

Computed frontier‐orbital energies (eV):
  HOMO-2  −7.3057732
  HOMO-1  −6.9286592
  HOMO    −6.3375439
  LUMO    −2.4651235
  LUMO+1   0.58631725
  LUMO+2   0.59688153

Headline result (HOMO–LUMO gap): 3.8724203204204555 eV

No warnings were reported by the engine.

Integrity verdict: trustworthy

Provenance: computed using the specified DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP) single-point calculation in PySCF through chemkit’s frontier-orbitals skill.
